name: crashloop-rollback-deployment
description: CrashLoopBackOff: rollback deployment to last stable version via ArgoCD
steps: Check deployment rollout history: kubectl rollout history deployment/<name> -n <namespace>
Identify last stable revision (look for annotations)
Trigger rollback via ArgoCD: argocd app rollback <app-name> --insecure
If ArgoCD unavailable, use kubectl: kubectl rollout undo deployment/<name> -n <namespace>
Monitor rollback status: kubectl rollout status deployment/<name> -n <namespace>
Confirm pods are healthy: kubectl get pods -n <namespace>
Check logs for stability: kubectl logs -l app=<name> --tail=50 -n <namespace>
Create GitHub issue to track root cause of crashing version
rollback: Re-apply previous deployment manifest from Git history
